name: wuphf-dev-tooling
description: Root-level dev tooling (secretlint, commitlint). The Go v0 app lives at the repo root; web UI lives in ./web with its own package.json; v1 protocol package lives in ./packages/protocol; v1 broker package lives in ./packages/broker. The v1 desktop shell + installer pipeline moved to the nex-crm/nex-local repo.

dependencyOverrideNotes.fast-uri: Pinned to 3.1.2 so bun audit --audit-level high stays clean for transitive Ajv consumers. Remove when all workspace dependency chains resolve to fast-uri 3.1.2 or newer without an override.
